name: js-tooling
description: Claude Code plugin for @rtorcato/js-tooling — the JavaScript/TypeScript tooling distribution (setup/doctor/fix CLI + shared config bases). Ships two skills: js-tooling and npm-publish.

plugins.name: js-tooling
plugins.description: Two skills in one plugin: how to adopt the shared presets + CLI, and how releases work (semantic-release owns the version — never publish by hand).
